metadata.action: Coordinate aspiration, cultures, and discuss I&D versus staged revision with attending

metadata.description: Cross-neighborhood reference stub for polyethylene-wear-osteolysis.

metadata.claim_text: Present indication, relevant imaging, implant/fixation concepts, and escalation pathway for hip prosthetic joint infection.

metadata.description: Bearing insert articulating with femoral head or femoral component.

metadata.claim_text: Hip PJI is not cellulitis — aspiration and timeline drive implant retention versus revision.
Board trap: oversimplifying hip prosthetic joint infection without attending-level implant, fixation, or infection context.

metadata.description: Cross-neighborhood reference stub for compartment-syndrome.

metadata.claim_text: Attending pearl: connect hip prosthetic joint infection anatomy, implant interfaces, and shared trauma neighborhoods before operative planning.

Articular femoral head supplied largely by retinacular and circumflex vessels.
